description: Seed golden test for First Notice of Loss
parsed_text:
FIRST NOTICE OF LOSS
Reported Date: 2026-08-15
Reported Time: 9:35 AM CT
Reported By: Marcus Hale, Operations Director
Phone: 312-555-0198
Policy Number: CPP-7844129-06
Insured: Northstar Cold Storage LLC
Loss Date: 2026-08-14
Loss Time: approximately 11:40 PM
Loss Location: 1440 River Road, Joliet, IL
Cause of Loss: ammonia refrigeration equipment failure
Description: temperature excursion caused spoilage of customer produce inventory in cold room 3
Injuries Reported: No
Authority Report: Fire department incident report JFD-2026-4481
Estimated Loss: $590,000
Mitigation Actions: isolated cold room 3; transferred unaffected inventory; contacted refrigeration contractor; preserved temperature logs
